mapper.select:
select count(ps.id) from jsh_product_supplier ps left join jsh_supplier s on ps.supplier_id=s.id and ifnull(s.delete_Flag,'0') !='1' left join jsh_material_extend me on me.bar_code=ps.bar_code and ifnull(me.delete_Flag,'0') !='1' left join jsh_material m on m.id=me.material_id and ifnull(m.delete_Flag,'0') !='1' where 1=1
and s.id = #{supplierId}
and (me.bar_code like #{bindKey} or m.name like #{bindKey} or ps.model like #{bindKey})
and ifnull(ps.delete_flag,'0') !='1'
